---
name: Propose a case study
about: Share an anonymised real incident as a case study
title: "[case-study] "
labels: case-study
---

## What broke

Short description of the symptom.

## What was actually wrong

Brief diagnosis.

## How long did it take to resolve

Hours, days, etc.

## What did you learn

The takeaway someone else should benefit from.

## Are you willing to write it up

If yes, follow the format in [case-studies/01-action-name-not-found.md](../case-studies/01-action-name-not-found.md). Otherwise, share enough detail here that a maintainer can write it up.

## Anonymisation note

Confirm that the description does not include real org names, customer names, employee names, or anything else that should not be public.
